samples.title: Tide Times
samples.subtitle: Watch this one build live
samples.prompt: A tide times app for surfers. Show today's high + low tides for the nearest beach, with a glanceable Apple Watch complication and a haptic at the next low tide. Calm, ocean-aware UI.
samples.outcome: A real surfer would check this before paddling out.

samples.title: HabitFlow
samples.subtitle: Start your first real build
samples.prompt: A daily habit tracker. Three habits max, streaks shown as a horizontal flame, missed-day forgiveness once a week, a soft chime when the streak grows. Minimal, calming, no analytics.
samples.outcome: Tiny, sticky, the kind of thing you actually open every day.

samples.title: Warm Streaks
samples.subtitle: Warm streak habit sample
samples.prompt: A habit tracker that feels like lighting a small candle each morning. Three habits max, a warm streak ribbon that glows gently as the week fills in, one forgiveness token per week, lock-screen widget, soft haptic when the flame grows, private and kind when you miss a day.
samples.outcome: Makes consistency feel warm instead of punitive.

samples.title: MoodBloom
samples.subtitle: Pastel reflection sample
samples.prompt: A pastel mood journal for nightly reflection. Ask one gentle question, turn each answer into a color petal on a weekly bloom, surface one private pattern on Sundays, add a breathing haptic before save, no feeds, no streak pressure, fully offline.
samples.outcome: Turns self-reflection into a calm ritual, not homework.

samples.title: PodcastNotes
samples.subtitle: Start your first real build
samples.prompt: An app that listens alongside Podcasts and captures highlights. Tap the watch face during a listen to mark the moment. Daily digest summarises every highlight with a one-line takeaway.
samples.outcome: Stops the 'I heard a great quote and now I can't find it' problem.
